title: Sawmill Conquest Modsupport
description: Conquest adaptation of all Sawmill textures(gui and everything) to be compatible with your favorite texture pack!
body:
Full adaptation for Conquest Resource pack,everything shown in the image gallery.

_**ISTRUCTIONS**_

Load above Conquest Resource 

**FEATURES**

-The work uniform of the villager will not overwrite the villager face now and is compatible with Conquest style. 

-Adaptation of the sawmill block and GUI to Conquest style.


![The Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VI2kpXtk/images/4b25155aa23c5683a404aedb50439d6b37c1dfc4.png)

![The sawmill block with animated saw!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VI2kpXtk/images/65272f82f1b4a64f8899aa366165ef36a7ece79e.png)

![The work uniform of the villager.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VI2kpXtk/images/6a6c57981a01e96c6517fbf7aad6702029a3220c.png)

Big thanks to Monsterfish to allow the making of mod support!
